scripts.docs:check: grep -q 'npm install -g @opsyhq/opsy' README.md && ! grep -R -E 'opsy (project|stack|draft|revision|run|org)\b' README.md skills/opsy/references/commands.md
scripts.smoke: node packages/cli/dist/bin.js --help >/dev/null && node packages/cli/dist/bin.js discovery --help >/dev/null && node packages/cli/dist/bin.js observability aws --help >/dev/null
